parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide empty members
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor White
  BorderColor Gray
  ArrowColor Gray
}

title UML Diagram: Class VariableRelationship in Context

legend top left
  **Hints**
  - Move the mouse cursor over a name to see more information.
  - Click on a name to go to the corresponding page.
endlegend

class "Conceptual::\nVariableRelationship" as VariableRelationship #Gold {
  identifier : <color:blue>Identifier</color>
  semantics : <color:blue>ControlledVocabularyEntry</color>
}

class "Conceptual::\n<color:blue>ConceptualVariable</color>" as ConceptualVariable
class "Conceptual::\n<color:blue>VariableStructure</color>" as VariableStructure
class "CollectionsPattern::\n<color:blue>//MemberRelationship//</color>" as MemberRelationship

VariableRelationship --> ConceptualVariable : hasSource
VariableRelationship --> ConceptualVariable : hasTarget
VariableStructure -up-> VariableRelationship : has
VariableRelationship ..> MemberRelationship : <<Refine>>

footer DDI Cross Domain Integration (DDI-CDI) 1.0 - Conceptual::VariableRelationship
@enduml
```
